services.name: timemachine
services.entrypoint:
/bin/sh -c 'printf "[global]
  load printers = no
  log file = /var/log/samba/log.%%m
  logging = file
  max log size = 1000
  security = user
  server min protocol = SMB2
  server role = standalone server
  smb ports = 445
  workgroup = WORKGROUP
  vfs objects = catia fruit streams_xattr
  fruit:aapl = yes
  fruit:nfs_aces = no
  fruit:model = TimeCapsule8,119
  fruit:metadata = stream
  fruit:veto_appledouble = no
  fruit:posix_rename = yes
  fruit:zero_file_id = yes
  fruit:wipe_intentionally_left_blank_rfork = yes
  fruit:delete_empty_adfiles = yes

[TimeMachine]
  path = /opt/${TM_USERNAME}
  read only = no
  valid users = ${TM_USERNAME}
  vfs objects = catia fruit streams_xattr
  fruit:time machine = yes
  fruit:time machine max size = 0
" > /etc/samba/smb.conf && if [ -n "${ADDITIONAL_SHARE_NAME}" ]; then printf "
[${ADDITIONAL_SHARE_NAME}]
  path = /shares/additional
  read only = no
  valid users = ${TM_USERNAME}
  vfs objects = catia fruit streams_xattr
" >> /etc/samba/smb.conf; fi && exec /entrypoint.sh s6-svscan /etc/s6'
